response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, employs 342 people and reported a strong year with total revenue of $54.4 million. The company's quarterly performance included $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and a robust $16.2 million in Q4. This marked an impressive 18% year-over-year growth for the fiscal year.
